creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/binutils and devel/libbfd both install the following

	 include/ansidecl.h
	 include/bfd.h
	 include/bfdlink.h
	 include/symcat.h
	 lib/libbfd.a
	 lib/libbfd.la

	This clearly makes these two ports conflict, but none of them
	bears a proper CONFLICTS.

Fix: 

Removing devel/libbfd or add proper CONFLICTS.
